concerns.text: Task T028 (Generate completeness_report.json) is marked as incomplete [ ]. Spec SC-004 requires measuring dataset completeness per source. Without this task being executable, the success criterion SC-004 cannot be satisfied.

Task T032 (Feature Engineering Pipeline) is marked as incomplete [ ] with a 'FAILED: unspecified' note. Spec FR-003 requires computing 5 descriptors. Without this task, the feature engineering requirement is unmet.

Task T037 (Generate model_metrics.json) is marked as incomplete [ ]. Spec FR-004 and SC-001/SC-002 require reporting R² and MAE metrics. Without this task, the model validation requirements are unmet.
Task T030 (Integration test for model training) is marked as incomplete [ ]. The plan requires independent testing of US2. Without this test, the user story cannot be verified as complete.

Tasks T059 through T063 (Phase 7: Revision & Gap Resolution) are all marked as incomplete [ ]. These tasks are explicitly defined to resolve critical gaps (T032 dependency, T037 output logic, T042 resample count, T006 source traceability, T004 resource constraints) identified in the analyze report. Their absence means the plan's identified flaws remain unaddressed, preventing a valid implementation.

Task T006 (Create elemental_properties.csv) is marked as incomplete [ ]. Spec FR-003 and Constitution Principle VI require a fixed local CSV for descriptor calculation. Without this data file, the feature engineering pipeline cannot execute reproducibly.

Tasks T057 (NIST URL Resolution) and T058 (Journal DOI Resolution) are marked [BLOCKED] and incomplete. Spec FR-001 requires aggregating data from 3 distinct sources. While T016b/T017b verify sources, T057/T058 are the actual resolution steps required to unblock T016/T017. Without these being resolved (or a fallback plan task), FR-001 is unachievable.
